title: SQL: Add Constraint:
poc: create table t1(id int, name varchar(1024));
alter table t1 add constraint id_p primary key(id);
create table t2(id_f int, age int, foreign key(id_f) references t1(id));
alter table t2 add constraint age_p primary key(age);
key_bug_features: Adding primary key constraint on foreign key table
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(id INT, name VARCHAR(1024));
ALTER TABLE t1 ADD CONSTRAINT id_p PRIMARY KEY(id);
CREATE TABLE t2(id_f INT, age INT, FOREIGN KEY(id_f) REFERENCES t1(id));
ALTER TABLE t2 ADD CONSTRAINT age_p PRIMARY KEY(age);
